sections.paragraph:
προΐστημι [πρό, ἵστημι]

—1. ‘be in a position of leading’, direct, be at the head (of) 1 Th 5:12; 1 Ti 3:4f, 12; 5:17.

—2. ‘have interest in’ (in Greco-Roman society special praise was accorded to pers. who performed meritorious service in behalf of the public) give aid Ro 12:8; engage inTit 3:8, 14.
